text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, T.M. Opera O and I are training on a
dirt track, when...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Phew... Hmm?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, could you bring me a mirror? I must
confirm something about my beauty.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I'm concerned about the mud being kicked about
while running. I would check that it hasn't soiled
my face.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Not that anything could ever hinder my
resplendence!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't see anything, but I go get a mirror for her
anyway.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes, that angle is perfect. Now, pardon me a
moment...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It cannot be!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My beauty has reached such a magnitude without
my knowledge?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
See for yourself. Do I not appear more dazzling
and gallant than ever before?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... In recent races, I had sensed a difference in
the crowd's gaze while being showered by their
ovations.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But who would blame them? None are capable of
resisting this magnificent aura!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You need not be shy. Look at me. Take aaall the
time you need.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is by natural law that flowers captivate. Truly,
you must wish to spend your time gazing at me,
the greatest flower of them all.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Have the stretchers on standby for the next race. Some are bound to faint when met with this sight.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas... This is the burden I must bear for being so
beautiful. But bear it I shall!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's more fascinated with herself than usual.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... To think, how gorgeous I've become...
choice_data_list: Um, you look the same to me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... It seems your eyes are in need of
refinement, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But fear not! I shall impart unto you the key to
seeing the finest aesthetics.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Look upon me one hundred times every day.
Hehe, I know. How could it be so simple?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Who better to study if you are to learn what
beauty entails? Ah yes, write a report as well. I
shall assign a grade for each one you submit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I'm forced to gaze upon Opera O's face
for quite a long while.
